<USER_REQUEST>
You are hardening the SMSentry Android app for production. Focus on error handling, edge cases, and robustness.

Working directory: D:\SMSentry

DO NOT modify these files (other agents are editing them):
- DeepCheckSession.kt
- LiteRtLmEngine.kt
- DeepCheckConfig.kt
- PromptTemplates.kt
- OfficialSitesRepository.kt
- SmsRepository.kt
- InboxScreen.kt
- DetailScreen.kt
- Theme files

## Tasks:

### 1. ModelRepository robustness
Read `D:\SMSentry\app\src\main\java\com\smssentry\deepcheck\data\ModelRepository.kt`
- Add proper error states (DOWNLOAD_FAILED, CORRUPT, etc.)
- Handle disk space checks before download
- Handle network connectivity checks
- Add retry logic with exponential backoff for downloads
- Verify SHA256 after download (config has MODEL_SHA256)

### 2. ModelDownloadManager robustness
Read `D:\SMSentry\app\src\main\java\com\smssentry\deepcheck\ModelDownloadManager.kt`
- Handle partial downloads (resume support)
- Show proper error messages to user
- Handle app backgrounding during download

### 3. PrivacyProxyClient error handling
Read `D:\SMSentry\app\src\main\java\com\smssentry\deepcheck\proxy\PrivacyProxyClient.kt`
- Add proper timeout handling
- Handle SSL/certificate errors gracefully
- Add circuit breaker pattern (don't retry if server is down)

### 4. LlmInference.kt error handling
Read `D:\SMSentry\app\src\main\java\com\smssentry\deepcheck\model\LlmInference.kt`
- Handle OOM errors (model too large for device RAM)
- Handle corrupted model file
- Log detailed error info for debugging

### 5. SMS permissions
Read `D:\SMSentry\app\src\main\AndroidManifest.xml`
Check all declared receivers/services exist. Ensure:
- Runtime permission requests are properly handled
- Missing permission graceful degradation

### 6. ProGuard/R8 rules
Read `D:\SMSentry\app\proguard-rules.pro`
Ensure all necessary keep rules for:
- LiteRT-LM classes
- Kotlin serialization
- Room entities
- Hilt generated code

After ALL changes, verify build compiles:
$env:JAVA_HOME = "C:\Program Files\Android\Android Studio\jbr"; $env:PATH = "$env:JAVA_HOME\bin;$env:PATH"; .\gradlew.bat assembleDebug 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern 'e:|BUILD'
</USER_REQUEST>

1: package com.smssentry.deepcheck.data
2: 
3: import android.content.Context
4: import android.net.ConnectivityManager
5: import android.net.NetworkCapabilities
6: import android.util.Log
7: import com.smssentry.deepcheck.util.Diagnostics
8: import com.smssentry.deepcheck.DeepCheckConfig
9: import com.smssentry.deepcheck.model.LiteRtLmEngine
10: import com.smssentry.deepcheck.model.LlmInferenceEngine
11: import dagger.hilt.android.qualifiers.ApplicationContext
12: import kotlinx.coroutines.CoroutineScope
13: import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
14: import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.MutableStateFlow
15: import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.StateFlow
16: import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.asStateFlow
17: import kotlinx.coroutines.launch
18: import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
19: import okhttp3.OkHttpClient
20: import okhttp3.Request
21: import java.io.File
22: import java.io.FileOutputStream
23: import java.io.IOException
24: import java.security.MessageDigest
25: import javax.inject.Inject
26: import javax.inject.Singleton
27: 
28: @Singleton
29: class ModelRepository @Inject constructor(
30:     @ApplicationContext private val context: Context,
31:     private val client: OkHttpClient,
32:     @com.smssentry.di.ApplicationScope private val applicationScope: CoroutineScope
33: ) {
34:     private val TAG = "ModelRepository"
35: 
36:     enum class State { IDLE, DOWNLOADING, VERIFYING, LOADING, READY, FAILED }
37: 
38:     private val _state = MutableStateFlow(State.IDLE)
39:     val state: StateFlow<State> = _state.asStateFlow()
40: 
41:     private val _progress = MutableStateFlow(0f)
42:     val progress: StateFlow<Float> = _progress.asStateFlow()
43: 
44:     private val _error = MutableStateFlow<String?>(null)
45:     val error: StateFlow<String?> = _error.asStateFlow()
46: 
47:     private var cachedEngine: LlmInferenceEngine? = null
48: 
49:     private val modelFile: File by lazy {
50:         val dir = File(context.filesDir, "models").also { it.mkdirs() }
51:         File(dir, DeepCheckConfig.MODEL_FILE_NAME)
52:     }
53: 
54:     init {
55:         // On startup, check if the model file already exists on disk.
56:         // If it does, automatically load the engine in the background so
57:         // the user does not have to re-download after every app restart.
58:         if (isModelDownloaded()) {
59:             Diagnostics.i(Diagnostics.MODEL, "init: model found on disk, size=${modelFile.length()} bytes, launching ensureReady")
60:             applicationScope.launch {
61:                 ensureReady()
62:             }
63:         } else {
64:             Diagnostics.i(Diagnostics.MODEL, "init: model file not found on disk")
65:         }
66:     }
67: 
68:     fun isModelDownloaded(): Boolean {
69:         val exists = modelFile.exists()
70:         val size = if (exists) modelFile.length() else 0L
71:         val result = exists && size >= DeepCheckConfig.MIN_FILE_SIZE_BYTES
72:         Diagnostics.d(Diagnostics.MODEL, "isModelDownloaded: exists=$exists, size=$size, minRequired=${DeepCheckConfig.MIN_FILE_SIZE_BYTES}, result=$result")
73:         return result
74:     }
75: 
76:     fun isOnWiFi(): Boolean {
77:         val cm = context.getSystemService(Context.CONNECTIVITY_SERVICE) as ConnectivityManager
78:         val network = cm.activeNetwork ?: return false
79:         val caps = cm.getNetworkCapabilities(network) ?: return false
80:         return caps.hasTransport(NetworkCapabilities.TRANSPORT_WIFI)
81:     }
82: 
83:     suspend fun ensureReady(): Boolean {
84:         if (_state.value == State.READY) {
85:             Diagnostics.d(Diagnostics.MODEL, "ensureReady: already READY, skipping")
86:             return true
87:         }
88: 
89:         if (!isModelDownloaded()) {
90:             Diagnostics.w(Diagnostics.MODEL, "ensureReady: model not downloaded, reverting to IDLE")
91:             _state.value = State.IDLE
92:             return false
93:         }
94: 
95:         Diagnostics.i(Diagnostics.MODEL, "ensureReady: ${_state.value}→LOADING")
96:         _state.value = State.LOADING
97:         return try {
98:             Diagnostics.timedSuspend(Diagnostics.MODEL, "ensureReady/load") {
99:                 withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
100:                     val engine = getEngine()
101:                     engine.load()
102:                     // Engine.initialize() succeeded — the model is valid.
103:                     // No additional validation probe is needed; running a
104:                     // throwaway generate("Say OK") was causing false FAILED
105:                     // states when the model produced blank output for that
106:                     // artificial prompt.
107:                     _state.value = State.READY
108:                     Diagnostics.i(Diagnostics.MODEL, "ensureReady: LOADING→READY")
109:                     Log.i(TAG, "Model loaded successfully")
110:                     true
111:                 }
112:             }
113:         } catch (e: Exception) {
114:             Log.e(TAG, "Failed to load model", e)
115:             Diagnostics.e(Diagnostics.MODEL, "ensureReady: LOADING→FAILED: ${e.message}", e)
116:             _state.value = State.FAILED
117:             _error.value = "Failed to load model: ${e.message}"
118:             false
119:         }
120:     }
121: 
122:     fun getEngine(): LlmInferenceEngine {
123:         cachedEngine?.let {
124:             Diagnostics.d(Diagnostics.MODEL, "getEngine: cache hit")
125:             return it
126:         }
127:         Diagnostics.i(Diagnostics.MODEL, "getEngine: cache miss, creating LiteRtLmEngine")
128:         val cacheDir = File(context.cacheDir, "litert_cache").also { it.mkdirs() }
129:         val engine = LiteRtLmEngine(modelFile.absolutePath, cacheDir.absolutePath)
130:         cachedEngine = engine
131:         return engine
132:     }
133: 
134:     suspend fun downloadModel() {
135:         if (_state.value == State.DOWNLOADING) {
136:             Diagnostics.d(Diagnostics.DOWNLOAD, "downloadModel: already DOWNLOADING, skipping")
137:             return
138:         }
139:         _error.value = null
140:         _state.value = State.DOWNLOADING
141:         _progress.value = 0f
142:         Diagnostics.i(Diagnostics.DOWNLOAD, "downloadModel: started, url=${DeepCheckConfig.MODEL_URL}")
143: 
144:         try {
145:             Diagnostics.timedSuspend(Diagnostics.DOWNLOAD, "downloadModel") {
146:                 withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
147:                     val existingBytes = if (modelFile.exists()) modelFile.length() else 0L
148:                     Diagnostics.i(Diagnostics.DOWNLOAD, "downloadModel: existingBytes=$existingBytes, resuming=${existingBytes > 0}")
149:                     val request = Request.Builder()
150:                         .url(DeepCheckConfig.MODEL_URL)
151:                         .apply {
152:                             if (existingBytes > 0) header("Range", "bytes=$existingBytes-")
153:                         }
154:                         .build()
155: 
156:                     client.newCall(request).execute().use { response ->
157:                         Diagnostics.d(Diagnostics.DOWNLOAD, "downloadModel: HTTP ${response.code}")
158:                         if (!response.isSuccessful && response.code != 206) {
159:                             if (response.code == 416) {
160:                                 Diagnostics.w(Diagnostics.DOWNLOAD, "downloadModel: 416 Range Not Satisfiable, deleting corrupt file")
161:                                 modelFile.delete()
162:                                 throw IOException("Download corrupted, restarting.")
163:                             }
164:                             throw IOException("Server error: ${response.code}")
165:                         }
166: 
167:                         val body = response.body ?: throw IOException("Empty body")
168:                         val totalSize = if (response.code == 206) existingBytes + body.contentLength() else body.contentLength()
169:                         Diagnostics.i(Diagnostics.DOWNLOAD, "downloadModel: totalSize=$totalSize bytes, contentLength=${body.contentLength()}")
170: 
171:                         val outputStream = FileOutputStream(modelFile, response.code == 206)
172:                         outputStream.use { out ->
173:                             val buffer = ByteArray(8192)
174:                             var bytesRead: Int
175:                             var bytesWritten = if (response.code == 206) existingBytes else 0L
176:                             var lastMilestone = 0
177: 
178:                             body.byteStream().use { input ->
179:                                 while (input.read(buffer).also { bytesRead = it } != -1) {
180:                                     out.write(buffer, 0, bytesRead)
181:                                     bytesWritten += bytesRead
182:                                     if (totalSize > 0) {
183:                                         _progress.value = bytesWritten.toFloat() / totalSize
184:                                         val pct = (bytesWritten * 100 / totalSize).toInt()
185:                                         val milestone = pct / 25 * 25
186:                                         if (milestone > lastMilestone && milestone in listOf(25, 50, 75, 100)) {
187:                                             Diagnostics.i(Diagnostics.DOWNLOAD, "downloadModel: $milestone% complete ($bytesWritten/$totalSize bytes)")
188:                                             lastMilestone = milestone
189:                                         }
190:                                     }
191:                                 }
192:                             }
193:                         }
194:                     }
195: 
196:                     Diagnostics.i(Diagnostics.DOWNLOAD, "downloadModel: download finished, verifying checksum")
197:                     _state.value = State.VERIFYING
198:                     if (!verifyChecksum()) {
199:                         Diagnostics.e(Diagnostics.DOWNLOAD, "downloadModel: checksum verification FAILED, deleting file")
200:                         modelFile.delete()
201:                         throw IOException("Checksum verification failed")
202:                     }
203:                     Diagnostics.i(Diagnostics.DOWNLOAD, "downloadModel: checksum verified, loading engine")
204: 
205:                     ensureReady()
206:                 }
207:             }
208:         } catch (e: Exception) {
209:             Log.e(TAG, "Download failed", e)
210:             Diagnostics.e(Diagnostics.DOWNLOAD, "downloadModel: FAILED: ${e.message}", e)
211:             _state.value = State.FAILED
212:             _error.value = e.message ?: "Unknown error"
213:         }
214:     }
215: 
216:     private fun verifyChecksum(): Boolean {
217:         return try {
218:             Diagnostics.timed(Diagnostics.DOWNLOAD, "verifyChecksum") {
219:                 val digest = MessageDigest.getInstance("SHA-256")
220:                 modelFile.inputStream().buffered().use { input ->
221:                     val buffer = ByteArray(8192)
222:                     var read: Int
223:                     while (input.read(buffer).also { read = it } != -1) {
224:                         digest.update(buffer, 0, read)
225:                     }
226:                 }
227:                 val actual = digest.digest().joinToString("") { "%02x".format(it.toInt() and 0xFF) }
228:                 val result = actual.equals(DeepCheckConfig.MODEL_SHA256, ignoreCase = true)
229:                 Diagnostics.i(Diagnostics.DOWNLOAD, "verifyChecksum: match=$result, actual=${actual.take(12)}…")
230:                 result
231:             }
232:         } catch (e: Exception) {
233:             Diagnostics.e(Diagnostics.DOWNLOAD, "verifyChecksum: exception: ${e.message}", e)
234:             false
235:         }
236:     }
237: 
238:     fun unload() {
239:         Diagnostics.i(Diagnostics.MODEL, "unload: disposing engine, hasEngine=${cachedEngine != null}")
240:         cachedEngine?.close()
241:         cachedEngine = null
242:         _state.value = State.IDLE
243:         Diagnostics.i(Diagnostics.MODEL, "unload: state→IDLE")
244:     }
245: }
246:

228:     private fun verifyChecksum(file: File): Boolean {
229:         return try {
230:             val digest = java.security.MessageDigest.getInstance("SHA-256")
231:             file.inputStream().buffered().use { stream ->
232:                 val buffer = ByteArray(8192)

238:             // FIX: Use 'toInt() and 0xFF' to handle signed bytes correctly during hex conversion
239:             val actual = digest.digest().joinToString("") { "%02x".format(it.toInt() and 0xFF) }
240:             val matches = actual.equals(MODEL_SHA256, ignoreCase = true)
241:             if (!matches) {
242:                 Log.e(TAG, "Checksum mismatch! Expected: $MODEL_SHA256, Actual: $actual")
243:             }

245:         } catch (e: Exception) {

7: import okhttp3.OkHttpClient

9: import java.time.LocalDate
10: import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit
11: 
12: data class WhoisResult(
13:     val creationDate: LocalDate?,
14:     val registrar: String?
15: )
16: 
17: class PrivacyProxyClient(private val baseUrl: String?) {
18: 
19:     private val client = OkHttpClient.Builder()
20:         .connectTimeout(3, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
21:         .readTimeout(3, TimeUnit.SECONDS)
22:         .build()
23: 
24:     private val json = Json { ignoreUnknownKeys = true }
25: 
26:     @Volatile
27:     private var lastHealthCheckTime: Long = 0L
28: 
29:     @Volatile
30:     private var lastHealthCheckResult: Boolean = false
31: 
32:     suspend fun isAvailable(): Boolean {
33:         if (baseUrl.isNullOrBlank()) return false
34: 
35:         val now = System.currentTimeMillis()
36:         if (now - lastHealthCheckTime < 5 * 60 * 1000) {
37:             return lastHealthCheckResult
38:         }
39: 
40:         return try {
41:             withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
42:                 val request = Request.Builder()
43:                     .url("$baseUrl/health")
44:                     .get()
45:                     .build()
46:                 val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
47:                 val success = response.isSuccessful
48:                 lastHealthCheckResult = success
49:                 lastHealthCheckTime = now
50:                 success
51:             }
52:         } catch (e: Exception) {
53:             lastHealthCheckResult = false
54:             lastHealthCheckTime = now
55:             false
56:         }
57:     }
58: 
59:     suspend fun whois(domain: String): WhoisResult {
60:         if (baseUrl.isNullOrBlank()) throw IllegalStateException("Proxy not configured")
61: 
62:         return withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
63:             val request = Request.Builder()
64:                 .url("$baseUrl/whois?domain=$domain")
65:                 .get()
66:                 .build()
67:             val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
68:             val body = response.body?.string() ?: throw Exception("Empty response")
69:             val result = json.decodeFromString<WhoisResponse>(body)
70:             WhoisResult(
71:                 creationDate = result.creationDate?.let { try { LocalDate.parse(it) } catch (e: Exception) { null } },
72:                 registrar = result.registrar
73:             )
74:         }
75:     }
76: 
77:     suspend fun fetchPage(url: String): String {
78:         if (baseUrl.isNullOrBlank()) throw IllegalStateException("Proxy not configured")
79: 
80:         return withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
81:             val request = Request.Builder()
82:                 .url("$baseUrl/fetch-page?url=$url")
83:                 .get()
84:                 .build()
85:             val response = client.newCall(request).execute()
86:             response.body?.string() ?: ""
87:         }
88:     }
89: }
90: 
91: @Serializable
92: private data class WhoisResponse(
93:     val creationDate: String? = null,
94:     val registrar: String? = null
95: )
96:

1: package com.smssentry.deepcheck.model
2: 
3: import kotlinx.serialization.Serializable
4: import kotlinx.serialization.json.Json
5: import kotlinx.coroutines.CompletableDeferred
6: import kotlinx.coroutines.Dispatchers
7: import kotlinx.coroutines.withContext
8: import com.google.ai.edge.litertlm.Message
9: import com.smssentry.deepcheck.util.Diagnostics
10: 
11: sealed class LlmResponse {
12:     data class Text(val text: String) : LlmResponse()
13:     data class ToolCall(val name: String, val arguments: String) : LlmResponse()
14:     data class Error(val error: String) : LlmResponse()
15: }
16: 
17: data class ChatMessage(
18:     val role: String,
19:     val content: String? = null,
20:     val toolCall: LlmResponse.ToolCall? = null
21: )
22: 
23: data class Tool(
24:     val name: String,
25:     val description: String,
26:     val parameters: String
27: )
28: 
29: 
30: open class LlmConversationSession(
31:     private val conversation: com.google.ai.edge.litertlm.Conversation? = null
32: ) {
33:     /**
34:      * Send a user turn and collect the full model response.
35:      *
36:      * Uses sendMessageAsync + MessageCallback (the Gallery pattern) instead
37:      * of the blocking sendMessage. This is critical because:
38:      * 1. sendMessage blocks the IO thread for the entire inference (~30-60s on 4B)
39:      * 2. sendMessageAsync streams tokens via callbacks, keeping the thread free
40:      * 3. Coroutine cancellation works properly at the await() suspension point
41:      */
42:     open suspend fun sendTurn(userText: String): String = withContext(Dispatchers.IO) {
43:         val conv = conversation ?: throw IllegalStateException("No active conversation")
44:         Diagnostics.i(Diagnostics.ENGINE, "sendTurn: prompt=${userText.length} chars")
45:         val startMs = System.currentTimeMillis()
46:         val result = CompletableDeferred<String>()
47:         val responseBuilder = StringBuilder()
48:         var tokenCount = 0
49: 
50:         conv.sendMessageAsync(
51:             com.google.ai.edge.litertlm.Contents.of(userText),
52:             object : com.google.ai.edge.litertlm.MessageCallback {
53:                 override fun onMessage(message: Message) {
54:                     tokenCount++
55:                     // Each callback delivers the NEXT chunk of text (not accumulated).
56:                     // Append to build the full response.
57:                     responseBuilder.append(LiteRtLmEngine.extractTextFromMessage(message))
58:                 }
59: 
60:                 override fun onDone() {
61:                     val elapsed = System.currentTimeMillis() - startMs
62:                     val response = responseBuilder.toString()
63:                     Diagnostics.i(Diagnostics.ENGINE, "sendTurn complete: ${response.length} chars, $tokenCount callbacks, ${elapsed}ms")
64:                     result.complete(response)
65:                 }
66: 
67:                 override fun onError(throwable: Throwable) {
68:                     val elapsed = System.currentTimeMillis() - startMs
69:                     Diagnostics.e(Diagnostics.ENGINE, "sendTurn error after ${elapsed}ms: ${throwable.message}", throwable)
70:                     result.completeExceptionally(throwable)
71:                 }
72:             }
73:         )
74: 
75:         result.await()
76:     }
77: 
78:     open fun close() {
79:         Diagnostics.d(Diagnostics.ENGINE, "Conversation session closed")
80:         conversation?.close()
81:     }
82: }
83: 
84: interface LlmInferenceEngine {
85:     suspend fun load()
86:     suspend fun generate(prompt: String): String
87:     fun createSession(systemPrompt: String): LlmConversationSession
88:     fun close()
89: }
90: 
91: @Serializable
92: data class VerdictJson(
93:     val verdict: String,
94:     val confidence: Float,
95:     val reasoning: String,
96:     val evidence: List<String>
97: )
98: 
99: object VerdictParser {
100:     private val json = Json { ignoreUnknownKeys = true }
101: 
102:     fun extractJson(text: String): String? {
103:         var depth = 0
104:         var startIndex = -1
105:         var inString = false
106:         var escape = false
107: 
108:         for (i in text.indices) {
109:             val c = text[i]
110:             when {
111:                 escape -> escape = false
112:                 (c == '\\') && inString -> escape = true
113:                 c == '"' -> inString = !inString
114:                 !inString && (c == '{') -> {
115:                     if (depth == 0) startIndex = i
116:                     depth++
117:                 }
118:                 !inString && (c == '}') -> {
119:                     depth--
120:                     if ((depth == 0) && (startIndex >= 0)) {
121:                         return text.substring(startIndex, i + 1)
122:                     }
123:                 }
124:             }
125:         }
126:         return null
127:     }
128: 
129:     fun parseVerdict(jsonStr: String): VerdictJson? {
130:         return try {
131:             val verdict = json.decodeFromString<VerdictJson>(jsonStr)
132:             if (verdict.verdict in listOf("SAFE", "SCAM", "SUSPICIOUS") &&
133:                 verdict.confidence in 0.0f..1.0f
134:             ) {
135:                 verdict
136:             } else {
137:                 null
138:             }
139:         } catch (e: Exception) {
140:             null
141:         }
142:     }
143: }
144: 
145: data class ParsedEducationalVerdict(
146:     val verdictLabel: String,
147:     val confidence: Float,
148:     val scamType: String,
149:     val explanation: String
150: )
151: 
152: object EducationalVerdictParser {
153:     private val TAG_PATTERN = Regex(
154:         """<<<\s*VERDICT\s*:\s*(\w+)\s*,\s*([\d.]+)\s*,\s*([^>]+?)\s*>>>""",
155:         setOf(RegexOption.IGNORE_CASE, RegexOption.DOT_MATCHES_ALL)
156:     )
157: 
158:     private val PARTIAL_TAG = Regex(
159:         """<<<\s*VERDICT\s*:\s*(\w+)\s*,\s*([\d.]+)""",
160:         setOf(RegexOption.IGNORE_CASE, RegexOption.DOT_MATCHES_ALL)
161:     )
162: 
163:     fun parse(rawOutput: String): ParsedEducationalVerdict? {
164:         val match = TAG_PATTERN.find(rawOutput)
165:         if (match != null) {
166:             val (verdictStr, confidenceStr, scamType) = match.destructured
167:             var explanation = rawOutput.substringAfter(match.value).trim()
168:             if (explanation.isBlank()) {
169:                 explanation = rawOutput.substringBefore(match.value).trim()
170:             }
171:             if (explanation.isBlank()) return null
172:             return ParsedEducationalVerdict(
173:                 verdictLabel = normalizeVerdict(verdictStr),
174:                 confidence = confidenceStr.toFloatOrNull()?.coerceIn(0f, 1f) ?: 0.5f,
175:                 scamType = scamType.trim().ifBlank { "unknown" },
176:                 explanation = explanation
177:             )
178:         }
179: 
180:         val partial = PARTIAL_TAG.find(rawOutput) ?: return null
181:         val verdictStr = partial.groupValues[1]
182:         val confidenceStr = partial.groupValues[2]
183:         val afterTag = rawOutput.substringAfter(partial.value).trim()
184:         val beforeTag = rawOutput.substringBefore(partial.value).trim()
185:         val explanation = afterTag.ifBlank { beforeTag }.ifBlank { return null }
186: 
187:         return ParsedEducationalVerdict(
188:             verdictLabel = normalizeVerdict(verdictStr),
189:             confidence = confidenceStr.toFloatOrNull()?.coerceIn(0f, 1f) ?: 0.5f,
190:             scamType = "unknown",
191:             explanation = explanation
192:         )
193:     }
194: 
195:     private fun normalizeVerdict(raw: String): String = when (raw.uppercase()) {
196:         "SCAM" -> "SCAM"
197:         "SAFE" -> "SAFE"
198:         else -> "SUSPICIOUS"
199:     }
200: }

1: package com.smssentry.deepcheck.util
2: 
3: import android.util.Log
4: import java.util.concurrent.ConcurrentLinkedDeque
5: import java.util.concurrent.atomic.AtomicLong
6: import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.MutableStateFlow
7: import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.StateFlow
8: import kotlinx.coroutines.flow.asStateFlow
9: 
10: /**
11:  * Centralized diagnostic logger for the Deep Check pipeline.
12:  *
13:  * All events are:
14:  * 1. Printed to Logcat with consistent tags
15:  * 2. Stored in a ring buffer accessible via [events] StateFlow
16:  * 3. Timed automatically when using [timed] blocks
17:  *
18:  * Filter in Logcat with: `tag:SMSentry`
19:  */
20: object Diagnostics {
21: 
22:     private const val TAG = "SMSentry"
23:     private const val MAX_EVENTS = 200
24: 
25:     data class Event(
26:         val id: Long,
27:         val timestamp: Long,
28:         val category: String,
29:         val message: String,
30:         val durationMs: Long? = null,
31:         val level: Level = Level.INFO
32:     ) {
33:         enum class Level { DEBUG, INFO, WARN, ERROR }
34: 
35:         override fun toString(): String {
36:             val dur = if (durationMs != null) " [${durationMs}ms]" else ""
37:             val time = java.text.SimpleDateFormat("HH:mm:ss.SSS", java.util.Locale.US)
38:                 .format(java.util.Date(timestamp))
39:             return "[$time] [$category]$dur $message"
40:         }
41:     }
42: 
43:     private val counter = AtomicLong(0)
44:     private val buffer = ConcurrentLinkedDeque<Event>()
45:     private val _events = MutableStateFlow<List<Event>>(emptyList())
46:     val events: StateFlow<List<Event>> = _events.asStateFlow()
47: 
48:     // ── Logging methods ──────────────────────────────────────────────
49: 
50:     fun d(category: String, message: String) = log(Event.Level.DEBUG, category, message)
51:     fun i(category: String, message: String) = log(Event.Level.INFO, category, message)
52:     fun w(category: String, message: String) = log(Event.Level.WARN, category, message)
53:     fun e(category: String, message: String, throwable: Throwable? = null) {
54:         log(Event.Level.ERROR, category, message)
55:         throwable?.let { Log.e(TAG, "[$category] $message", it) }
56:     }
57: 
58:     @PublishedApi
59:     internal fun log(level: Event.Level, category: String, message: String, durationMs: Long? = null) {
60:         val event = Event(
61:             id = counter.incrementAndGet(),
62:             timestamp = System.currentTimeMillis(),
63:             category = category,
64:             message = message,
65:             durationMs = durationMs,
66:             level = level
67:         )
68:         buffer.addLast(event)
69:         while (buffer.size > MAX_EVENTS) buffer.pollFirst()
70:         _events.value = buffer.toList()
71: 
72:         val logMsg = "[$category] $message" + if (durationMs != null) " [${durationMs}ms]" else ""
73:         when (level) {
74:             Event.Level.DEBUG -> Log.d(TAG, logMsg)
75:             Event.Level.INFO  -> Log.i(TAG, logMsg)
76:             Event.Level.WARN  -> Log.w(TAG, logMsg)
77:             Event.Level.ERROR -> Log.e(TAG, logMsg)
78:         }
79:     }
80: 
81:     // ── Timed execution ──────────────────────────────────────────────
82: 
83:     /**
84:      * Execute [block] and log its duration.
85:      *
86:      * ```kotlin
87:      * val result = Diagnostics.timed("Engine", "initialize()") {
88:      *     engine.initialize()
89:      * }
90:      * ```
91:      */
92:     inline fun <T> timed(category: String, operation: String, block: () -> T): T {
93:         i(category, "▶ START $operation")
94:         val startNs = System.nanoTime()
95:         return try {
96:             val result = block()
97:             val ms = (System.nanoTime() - startNs) / 1_000_000
98:             log(Event.Level.INFO, category, "✓ DONE  $operation", ms)
99:             result
100:         } catch (ex: Exception) {
101:             val ms = (System.nanoTime() - startNs) / 1_000_000
102:             log(Event.Level.ERROR, category, "✗ FAIL  $operation — ${ex.message}", ms)
103:             throw ex
104:         }
105:     }
106: 
107:     /**
108:      * Suspend version of [timed].
109:      */
110:     suspend inline fun <T> timedSuspend(category: String, operation: String, crossinline block: suspend () -> T): T {
111:         i(category, "▶ START $operation")
112:         val startNs = System.nanoTime()
113:         return try {
114:             val result = block()
115:             val ms = (System.nanoTime() - startNs) / 1_000_000
116:             log(Event.Level.INFO, category, "✓ DONE  $operation", ms)
117:             result
118:         } catch (ex: Exception) {
119:             val ms = (System.nanoTime() - startNs) / 1_000_000
120:             log(Event.Level.ERROR, category, "✗ FAIL  $operation — ${ex.message}", ms)
